meaning: n.爱哭的人,软弱容易哭的人
examples: Well, we'll let the crybaby go home to his mother, won't we, Huck?
Here are a few ways to soothe your sweet little crybaby.
I was the one who was often called a crybaby by my family, friends or schoolmates.
Wilson said the slingshot tends to bring out the crybaby in otherwise tough running-back recruits.
Since Mr Seehofer had called Mr Westerwelle a crybaby just weeks earlier, it was a touching reconciliation.
